steps_raw.instruction: Add 200 µL of 0.5 mm beads to 2mL screw tube
Add 200 µL of 1 mm beads to 2mL screw tube
Add 870 µL Lysis master mix to 2mL screw tube. The final look: In 11F, 4°C fridge Lysis master mix: 225 µL of TE buffer + 375 µL of lysis buffer + 270 µL of 10M ammonium acetate

Collect 20-50 mg of sample to 2mL screw tube You can collect up to 100 mg of sample if you can until you bump into the low DNA quality or PCR success rate; by then it means too many inhibitors in the sample and you have to lower the input.
Put the 2mL screw tube in mixmill for sample crush, at 3200 rpm 00:04:00 Remember to balance if you have odd number of samples
Put 2mL screw tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 10 x g, 25 °C, 3 minutes
Add 350 µL of isopropanol to the 1st well of 96 well plate

Add 100 µL of magnetic beads (10 mg/ml) to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate Vortex the bottle and pipetting before using magnetic beads; re-do vortex after adding to 3 samples to prevent set down of magnetic beads

Add 300-500 µL of the sample (lysate) from the 1.5mL centrifuged tube to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate Pipetting as many lysate as you can , as long as it's free of any cell debris (no solids in your tip)
Add 400 µL of isopropanol to the 2nd well of 96 deep well plate
Add 300 µL of 80% ethanol to the 3rd well of 96 deep well plate
Add 300 µL of 95% ethanol to the 4th well of 96 deep well plate
Add 100 µL of DEPC-treated water to the 6th well of 96 deep well plate
Put the prepared 96 deep well plate in the automated DNA extraction machine and select the BOMB protocol
After the extraction is done, put on the 96 magnetic plate to pellet the magnetic bead residues.
Add 300 µL of DDW to the 5th well of 96 deep well plate
Collect 100 µL of the eluted sample (avoid getting magnetic bead) as the DNA template for downstream experiments
Add 50 µL of magnetic beads (10mg/ml) to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate
